# Image fixture provenance

- `face.jpg` — "Ed Walsh portrait 1911", from
  [Wikimedia Commons](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Ed_Walsh_portrait_1911.jpg).
  Public domain (work first published before 1929 / photographer's death + 70 years).
  Downscaled from the original (4788×3300) to 800px max dimension for repo size.
- `no_face.jpg` — converted from macOS's bundled `/System/Library/Desktop Pictures/Sonoma.heic`
  wallpaper (abstract, no people), used only to confirm the model doesn't fire on a clearly
  face-free image. Not redistributed beyond this local test use.
